Web Vulnerabilities

Quick access to common web testing areas. Keep each topic focused so payloads stay easy to scan under pressure.

Files

File Inclusion

LFI/RFI paths, wrappers, log poisoning notes, and traversal payloads.

Input

Injection

SQL injection checks, basic payloads, and quick database fingerprinting helpers.

Client

Client-Side

XSS checks, contexts, encodings, and quick payload references.
